title: LogRobotLocal Property
description:
For the position of the robot that is recorded during the force guide sequence execution, this property sets a Local coordinate system number as a reference.

The position of the robot is recorded as that of Tool coordinate system as viewed from the Local coordinate system specified by this property.

Values

0 (Base) Use the Local 0 coordinate system (Base coordinate system).

1 to 15 Use the Local coordinate system of the specified number.

Default:  0 (Base)

See Also: LogRobotLocal Property

LogInterval Property

LogMaxTime Property
